mapper.sql: select model_id, model_name, provider, base_url, api_key, model_type, status, is_default, priority, biz_types, model_code, reasoning_model_code, vision_model_code, support_stream, support_reasoning, support_vision from sc_ai_model_config
mapper.insert: insert into sc_ai_model_config(model_name, provider, base_url, api_key, model_type, status, is_default, priority, biz_types, model_code, reasoning_model_code, vision_model_code, support_stream, support_reasoning, support_vision, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{modelName}, #{provider}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{modelType}, #{status}, #{isDefault}, #{priority}, #{bizTypes}, #{modelCode}, #{reasoningModelCode}, #{visionModelCode}, #{supportStream}, #{supportReasoning}, #{supportVision}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_ai_model_config model_name = #{modelName}, provider = #{provider}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, api_key = #{apiKey}, model_type = #{modelType}, status = #{status}, is_default = #{isDefault}, priority = #{priority}, biz_types = #{bizTypes}, model_code = #{modelCode}, reasoning_model_code = #{reasoningModelCode}, vision_model_code = #{visionModelCode}, support_stream = #{supportStream}, support_reasoning = #{supportReasoning}, support_vision = #{supportVision}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = sysdate() where model_id = #{modelId}
